title: InboxListPanel: hide lane headers in single-lane mode
subtitle: medium

iterations.content:
When the inbox is scoped to a single lane (inside the lane detail tab), the lane separator header is redundant — the user already knows which lane they're in.

Added a `singleLane` boolean prop to `InboxListPanel`. When true:
- Lane separator div is hidden (`v-if="!singleLane"`)
- Header title changes from "Inbox of {project}" to just "Inbox"

This keeps the list panel compact and avoids visual noise in the lane context.
